Class Ship

java.lang.Object
game.Ship
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeyListener, EventListener
public class Ship extends Object implements KeyListener
CLASS: Ship DESCRIPTION: This class represents the player's ship in Snake Invaders It extends Polygon for it to be visually drawn, and implements KeyListener to process keyboard inputs. It features omnidirectional movement of the ship (press arrow keys), a way to shoot projectiles (press spacebar), an emote animation (press e), and boundary testing to keep the ship on screen.

  • Constructor Details

    • Ship

      public Ship(Point startingPosition)
      Creates a new ship at the given starting position.
      Parameters:
      startingPosition - the intial position of the ship

  • Method Details

    • move

      public void move()
      Updates the ship's position and animation state. Prevents the ship from moving outside the screen.

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed(KeyEvent e)
      Recognizes when keys are pressed and executes movement, shooting, and the emote (if it's not already emoting) accordingly.
      Specified by:
      keyPressed in interface KeyListener
      Parameters:
      e - the key event generated when a key is pressed

    • keyReleased

      public void keyReleased(KeyEvent e)
      Recognizes when keys are released and stops movement and shooting accordingly.
      Specified by:
      keyReleased in interface KeyListener
      Parameters:
      e - the key event generated when a key is released

    • keyTyped

      public void keyTyped(KeyEvent e)
      Required by the KeyListener interface. No typed key events are used.
      Specified by:
      keyTyped in interface KeyListener
      Parameters:
      e - the key event generated when a key is typed

    • paint

      public void paint(Graphics brush)
      Draws the ship on the screen.
      Parameters:
      brush - the Graphics object used to draw the ship

    • getPoints

      public Point[] getPoints()

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Point point)

    • rotate

      public void rotate(int degrees)

    • collides

      public boolean collides(game.Polygon other)
